text.message: All I have now is revenge
all i got is revenge real revenge
Now you’ll see what revenge is
We all see I lose road now right? Gotta block green and red
And you are concerned about your road
I’m concerned about being robbed 5 times in a row
I wasn’t leading it’s just a temporary road. Y’all handed it to black
Not gonna hand free cards but I don’t care
Would you believe that I have no knights
Should be game then with all those vps
black been plowing u all game
and u come back to let him win each time
u must be his little girl
slapped u around and u did nothing
Yall are all guilty kf that
